name: Lanolin The Sheep || Leader of the 2nd-Gen Diamond Cutters
description:
"When the Badniks attacked my hometown, I was terrified. I never wanted to feel so helpless or unprepared again. I didn't want anyone to have to feel that way."

Working alongside the Leader of the 2nd generation of Diamond Cutters, who is complaining about Sonic's recklessness once again.

Extra pics:

  • Someone requested this, but I'm too lazy to check who it was.

  • One of the lesser know yet still great characters of the IDW Comics. I love her feelings about the way Sonic and Eggman essentially play around with lives at stake.

  • Up next: ...Idk
creator: HakeemOL
